column1: Formation energies of the G3/99 dataset in units of eV.

All density functional data, except for B3LYP and PBE0, are computed from ground-state DFT calculations published in Wellendorff, Lundgaard, Mogelhoj, Petzold, Landis, Bligaard, Norskov, and Jacobsen: BEEF-vdW etc., Phys. Rev. B (2012).
